query: Quick heads up I am upstairs folding laundry and want the living room comfortable for when people come down. Kick on the living room fan 1 at 60% 20 minutes from now and bump it to 70% 5 minutes after the previous action. Start the living room AC 1 on cooling with its fan at 60% 14 minutes from now and raise its fan to 70% 27 minutes after the previous action so I do not have to run downstairs to tweak anything.

steps.thought: I need to schedule four timed actions for living room fan 1 and AC 1. First, I'll confirm the current time, then find the living room devices and their capabilities.
Now I have the current time. Let me get the list of rooms to find the living room ID, then get its devices.
Let me get the devices in the living room.
Now I need to get the device structures for living_room_fan_1 and living_room_air_conditioner_1 to understand their clusters and commands.
Now I'll check the air conditioner structure to understand its clusters and commands.

Now I have the structure for both devices. For the fan, I can use write_attribute to set PercentSetting. For the AC, I need to turn it on (already on), set SystemMode to Cooling (4), set fan speed via PercentSetting. I also need a cooling setpoint. Let me check the living room temperature and environment rules to decide a comfortable setpoint.
I'll schedule four separate workflows for each timed action. First, AC at 11:13:21.
Now schedule the fan action at 60%, 20 minutes from current time (10:59:21 -> 11:19:21).
Now schedule the fan to 70% at 11:24:21 (5 minutes after previous fan action at 11:19:21), and AC fan to 70% at 11:40:21 (27 minutes after AC start at 11:13:21).
Now I will schedule the AC fan raise to 70% at 11:40:21.

action_input.answer: Okay, I've got everything set for you. Here's the plan: At 11:13 AM, the living room AC 1 will turn on cooling mode and fan to 60% (setpoint 20.0°C). At 11:19 AM, the living room fan 1 will turn on at 60%. At 11:24 AM, the fan will bump to 70%. At 11:40 AM, the AC's fan will increase to 70%. All timed and ready so you can finish folding upstairs. Enjoy!

First, AC at 11:13:21.", "action": "schedule_workflow", "action_input": "{\"start_time\": \"2025-08-23 11:13:21\", \"steps\": [{\"tool\": \"write_attribute\", \"args\": {\"device_id\": \"living_room_air_conditioner_1\", \"endpoint_id\": 1, \"cluster_id\": \"Thermostat\", \"attribute_id\": \"SystemMode\", \"value\": 4}}, {\"tool\": \"write_attribute\", \"args\": {\"device_id\": \"living_room_air_conditioner_1\", \"endpoint_id\": 1, \"cluster_id\": \"Thermostat\", \"attribute_id\": \"OccupiedCoolingSetpoint\", \"value\": 2000}}, {\"tool\": \"write_attribute\", \"args\": {\"device_id\": \"living_room_air_conditioner_1\", \"endpoint_id\": 1, \"cluster_id\": \"FanControl\", \"attribute_id\": \"PercentSetting\", \"value\": 60}}]}"}

final_answer: Okay, I've got everything set for you. Here's the plan: At 11:13 AM, the living room AC 1 will turn on cooling mode and fan to 60% (setpoint 20.0°C). At 11:19 AM, the living room fan 1 will turn on at 60%. At 11:24 AM, the fan will bump to 70%. At 11:40 AM, the AC's fan will increase to 70%. All timed and ready so you can finish folding upstairs. Enjoy!
